creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=62c67c2cdca3548be7cad325d383e00c3068ee5a

commit 62c67c2cdca3548be7cad325d383e00c3068ee5a
Author:     Fernando Apesteguía <fernape@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: 2022-06-30 16:38:11 +0000
Commit:     Fernando Apesteguía <fernape@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2022-07-01 05:21:05 +0000

    graphics/megapov: Deprecate port

    graphics/megapov is no longer developed and abandoned upstream at least since
    2007. The recommended replacement is POV-Ray 3.7 which is available as
    graphics/povray37.

    There are no other ports depending on graphics/megapov.

    PR:     258819
    Reported by:    Philipp Ost <bsd@philippost.de>

 graphics/megapov/Makefile | 3 +++
 1 file changed, 3 insertions(+)
